title: Applications of Data Hiding Techniques
description: A visual overview of the primary applications of data hiding (steganography and watermarking) for security and privacy, showing the techniques used and their purposes.
relationships: Techniques like LSB Steganography and Audio/Video Watermarking are used to achieve Digital Watermarking and Steganography
Fingerprinting relies on unique identifiers embedded using watermarking techniques
Metadata Removal and File Obfuscation are preventative techniques to hide data existence rather than embed it
